summary: Workout Session Tracking Phase 1 fully tested. Backend: 16/16 tests pass for all 3 new endpoints (POST session/complete, GET sessions/user_id, GET last-session). Frontend: workout-detail.tsx renders correctly, Finish Workout button is visible at bottom, last-time hints display correctly from session history, completion modal shows with emoji + duration + Keep Going button. Session persistence confirmed (each call creates new document, 14 unique sessions in DB).

minor.issue: Endpoint does not filter by user_id. Returns most recent session from ANY user for that workout+day combination. In multi-user scenarios where different users reference the same workout_id, they would see each other's last-time hints. Acceptable for current design where workouts are user-specific copies, but worth noting.

ui_bugs.issue: Duration text shows '1 minutes' (grammatically incorrect, should be '1 minute' for singular). Affects any workout completed in exactly 1 minute.
No data-testid attributes on Finish Workout button, last-time hint Text, or completion modal elements. Makes automated testing harder but does not affect functionality.

test_results_detail.POST_session_complete_200: PASS - Returns 200 with id, total_volume, date
test_results_detail.POST_volume_calculation: PASS - 100*5 + 100*5 = 1000 (ignores uncompleted sets), 0 for bodyweight exercises
test_results_detail.POST_creates_new_document: PASS - Two calls produce different session IDs (no overwrite)
test_results_detail.GET_sessions_sorted_desc: PASS - Sessions sorted by date descending
test_results_detail.GET_sessions_multiple_reverse_chron: PASS - Multiple completions appear in reverse chronological order
test_results_detail.GET_last_session_null_when_none: PASS - Returns null for unknown workout_id
test_results_detail.GET_last_session_returns_session: PASS - Returns session object with workout_id, day_index, completed_exercises
test_results_detail.GET_last_session_day_index_filter: PASS - day_index=99 returns null when only day_index=0 sessions exist
test_results_detail.GET_last_session_most_recent: PASS - Returns latest session (vol=200) not older one (vol=100)
test_results_detail.workout_detail_renders: PASS - Page loads with exercises, day tabs, program info
test_results_detail.finish_workout_button_visible: PASS - Gold button with checkmark icon at bottom of exercise list
test_results_detail.last_time_hints: PASS - Shows 'Last time: 80kg × 10', '80kg × 8', '75kg × 8', '75kg × 6' from seeded session
test_results_detail.completion_modal: PASS - Shows 💪, 'Workout Complete!', duration in minutes, 'Keep Going 🔥' button
test_results_detail.session_persistence: PASS - 14 unique session documents in DB, all IDs distinct

action_items: LOW: Fix grammar in completion modal - '1 minutes' should be '1 minute' for singular. Change: `{completedSessionData.duration} minutes` to `{completedSessionData.duration} minute{completedSessionData.duration !== 1 ? 's' : ''}`
LOW: Add data-testid attributes to key new elements for future automated testing: finish-workout-btn, complete-modal, last-time-hint, complete-volume-stat, complete-duration-stat
LOW: Consider adding user_id filter to GET /api/workout/{id}/last-session endpoint for strict multi-user isolation (not critical given current design where each user has a unique workout copy)
critical_code_review_comments: workout-detail.tsx handleFinishWorkout: Correctly guards with if (!workout || !profile?.id) return - unauthenticated users cannot submit sessions
server.py WorkoutSession model: _id is properly excluded via session_dict.pop('_id', None) before returning - MongoDB ObjectId serialization handled correctly
server.py total_volume calc: Only counts sets where s.completed AND s.weight AND s.reps - correctly ignores uncompleted or bodyweight sets
useEffect([expandedDay, workout?.id]) correctly triggers loadLastSession on day tab switch
sessionStartTime reset on day switch (setSessionStartTime(new Date())) is correct behavior
No testID attributes added to new Finish Workout button, completion modal, or last-time hints - consider adding for testability

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all core features working; minor grammar issue in modal duration text)

seed_data_creation: Created 14 workout sessions in DB for workout 3da77f8d-557b-4dc4-9af8-612492855da2 (TEST_session_user_phase1 and cc2c6903 users) during testing. Sessions can be identified by user_id prefix 'TEST_session_user_phase1'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workout session tracking Phase 1 is complete and working. All 3 new endpoints tested (16/16 pass). Frontend: Finish Workout button visible at bottom, last-time hints showing from session history, completion modal working. Key design note: GET last-session endpoint returns most recent session for ANY user for that workout+day (no user_id filter). Test workout used: 3da77f8d-557b-4dc4-9af8-612492855da2. Test user: TEST_frontend_ui@test.com / Frontend123! (id: cc2c6903-108d-467a-9c40-cbc897dae3eb).
